# 🧠 AI Skills Platform — Master Skill Registry

> **1000 Skill Templates** across 10 domains · Each follows the Universal 5-Stage Pipeline
> 
> **How to use:** Copy any skill card, fill in the `[ ]` placeholders, and register it in your platform.

## 📋 Table of Contents

1. [Web Development](#web-dev) — 108 skills
2. [Data Science](#data-science) — 100 skills
3. [DevOps](#devops) — 96 skills

10. [Cybersecurity](#security) — 88 skills

## 🔁 Universal Pipeline (Applied to Every Skill)

```
User Input → [1] Input Intelligence → [2] Reasoning Engine
          → [3] Tool Execution → [4] Knowledge & Memory (parallel)
          → [5] Output Optimization → Final AI Skill Output 🚀
```
